titleStmt.title: SII 16.43: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 43. (A.R. No. 54 of 1915.) ĀTMAKŪRU, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Siddhēśvarasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1428 (current), Krōdhana, Kārtika ba. 3, Thursday, corresponding to 1505 A.D., November 14, which was Friday.
The record is damaged. It registers the gift of the village Ātukūru to the god Mallikārjuna of Śrīparvata by the king who is stated to be the son of Narasā-nāyaka and the grandson of Īśvara-nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīkaṁṭhāya samastalōka
jayamūlastaṁbharūpāyatē
kṣīrāṁbhōdhimahānasāya mahi
taśrīvāmadēvāya tē . braṁhmēṁdrādi kapā
laniścalaparīkṣādakṣarakṣāgurō . śrīmatpa
¨rvata mallikhā¨rjunamahādēvāya tubhya
ṁ namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracā
maracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūla
staṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1428 Agunē
ṭi krōdhanasaṁvatsara kā¨rttika ba 3 gu svastiśrī śrī
pa¨rvata śrīsvayaṁbhu śrīliṁgacakrava¨rtti
śrīmanmallikā¨rjuna śrīmanmahādēvuniki
yīśvaranāyaniṁgāri komāruṁḍai
na narasānāyaniṁgāri komāruṁḍaina
yiṁmaḍi narasanā
yaniṁgāru
nayabhayabhakti
ni sāṣṭāṁga daṁḍaṁ
veṭṭi yiccina dhaṁ¨rma
śāsanaṁ .
mā bhūmilōsa
damaged
nu puṇyaṁgānu
dēvara Amṛtapaḍiki
tathātithi kaṁnyā bṛ
haspati puṁṇya
damaged
galavāru
damaged
svāmyaṁgānu
māṁnyaṁgānu yī Ātukūri grāma
ṁ tathātithi kaṁnyābṛhaspati puṁṇyakālamaṁddu dēvara
[A]mṛtapaḍlakuṁnu trikaraṇaśuddhigānu dā
ravōsi yistimi gāna [Ācaṁdrā¨rka]stāyigānu sā¨rvakāla
muṁnu Anubhaviṁca navadhariṁcēdi yī dhaṁ¨rmānaku
yavaru virōdhiṁcci naḍacinānu vāraṇāsilōnu gaṁ
ga karutanu gōbrāṁhmaṇa vadhānu mātāpitṛvadhā
nu guruvadhānu cēsina pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru .
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . parada
ttāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavēt . svadattāṁ parada
ttāṁ vā yō ha rēti vasuṁdharā . ṣaṣṭi¨rva¨rṣasahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 16.43 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
